response.text:
Implemented Claude Code session harvesting from the real local storage layout in `~/.claude/projects`, emitting one event per assistant text response and tracking per-session offsets to avoid replays. Also wired a poll thread into the daemon and documented the on-disk schema and repo mapping in `schemas/claude.md`.

Details
- New harvesting module in `src/claude.rs` reads `<project_dir>/<session_id>.jsonl`, extracts assistant text + usage, and emits session events with rich meta.
- Daemon now starts a Claude poll loop alongside Cursor (`src/daemon.rs`), with env overrides for repo and directories.
- Schema docs updated with paths, JSONL structure, and mapping rules (`schemas/claude.md`).

Files changed/added
- `src/claude.rs`
- `src/daemon.rs`
- `src/main.rs`
- `schemas/claude.md`

Env knobs added
- `GG_CLAUDE_POLL`, `GG_CLAUDE_POLL_SECS`
- `GG_CLAUDE_REPO`
- `GG_CLAUDE_DIR`, `GG_CLAUDE_PROJECTS_DIR`

Next steps
1) Run `cargo build` to ensure it compiles.
2) Start the daemon and generate a Claude Code response in this repo, then verify a new session event appears under `refs/gg/sessions/<session_id>`.
